# Time-Indexed Regression: From Flexible Models to Trend {#time-indexed-regression}

```{r time-indexed-regression-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/time-indexed-regression-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/time-indexed-regression/"
)
```

```{r child-time-indexed-regression, child="../lecture-content/32-time-indexed-regression.Rmd"}
```
